data.title: Dell use case for agentic AI could revolve around search rather than commerce
data.description: There has been an uptick in traffic from agentic AI, but "nothing to the point that is earth-shaking or completely shattering for me just yet," an executive told Digital Commerce 360.

data.title: Oracle bets on agentic AI for its procurement solutions, adding new app to SCM
data.description: Its Design-to-Source Workspace is intended to leverage agentic AI to speed up processes between the design stage and requests for quotes.

data.title: Ace Hardware adds Uber Eats for last-mile delivery
data.description: The retailer now offers same-day delivery through both DoorDash and Uber Eats. Ace Hardware joins retailers in expanding their use of last-mile delivery partnerships to further their reach.

data.title: F.W. Webb launches mobile app for trade professionals
data.description: The distributor said its mobile app allows contractors, facility managers and technicians to order equipment and parts from their phones.

data.title: TradeCentric, commercetools partner on B2B ecommerce
data.description: The companies said in the announcement that their partnership helps suppliers grow revenue faster while making procurement less complex. TradeCentric and commercetools said the partnership will help suppliers connect digital storefronts "directly to buyers' procurement systems."
